name: icalp-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ICALP, the EATCS International Colloquium on Automata, Languages, and Programming: routing a theory result between Track A (algorithms, complexity, games) and Track B (automata, logic, semantics), the single annual February deadline, lightweight double-blind HotCRP submission, the 15-page extended abstract plus full-version/appendix norm, proof rigor in place of artifact evaluation, LIPIcs (Dagstuhl) open-access camera-ready, and the Track B rebuttal. Grounded in the ICALP 2026 (53rd, Royal Holloway) call, EATCS pages, LIPIcs/Dagstuhl, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
